lines: India versus Pakistan. Population only. Who has the bigger human advantage?
Total population is the obvious headline. India has about 1 point 45 billion people. Pakistan about 251 million.
Working-age population also massively favors India, which means a larger labor and recruitment base.
Urban population is another huge gap. India has far more people concentrated in major economic centers.
Median age is lower in Pakistan, which means it is younger. But India still wins overall scale by an enormous margin.
Internet users in absolute numbers are also heavily in India’s favor.
So if the question is pure demographic weight, this one is not close.
Pakistan has a young and growing population, but India combines growth with much bigger total scale.
By population power alone, India wins decisively.

seo.title: India vs Pakistan — Population Battle 🇮🇳👥🇵🇰
seo.description:
India vs Pakistan population comparison: total population, working-age population, urbanization, internet users, and age profile.
